title: UX Researcher
description: We're hiring a UX Researcher at Confluent. This is an exciting opportunity to join our technical, developer-obsessed, innovative team and make a direct impact on our mission. If you have 2-3 years years of experience and are passionate about Data Streaming, we'd love to hear from you.
responsibilities: Design and conduct user research studies to understand user needs and behaviors
Create research plans, screeners, and participant recruitment strategies
Synthesize qualitative and quantitative research findings into actionable insights
Present research findings to product and design teams
Collaborate with designers to validate design solutions through user testing
Build research repositories and share findings across organization

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Psychology, Human Factors, or related field

benefits: Flexible work schedule and remote work options
Wellness programs and gym membership reimbursement
